title: RCD Test Circuit
description: One row per RCD circuit tested on a board. Belongs to an rcd_test parent (the board + visit). Renders as one row in the Jemena xlsx deliverable. Timing values stored as text to preserve the '' / blank non-trip indicator used by the Jemena template — numeric coercion happens at report-rendering, not storage. Composite uniqueness: (rcd_test_id, section_label, circuit_no) — multi-section boards (e.g. 'Lighting Section' / 'Power Section') can legitimately have the same circuit_no in each section.

section_label.description: Optional sub-section within a board (e.g. 'Lighting Section', 'Power Section'). NULL when the board is not sub-sectioned. Part of the composite uniqueness key — multi-section boards can repeat circuit_no across sections.

circuit_no.description: Circuit identifier as labelled on the board. Stored as text to support non-numeric labels like '3a' or 'L1-7'.

normal_trip_current_ma.description: Trip current rating in mA (Jemena standard = 30 mA).

x1_no_trip_0_ms.description: Trip time at 1×IΔn, 0° phase, expected no trip. Empty/blank when no trip (Jemena convention).

x1_no_trip_180_ms.description: Trip time at 1×IΔn, 180° phase, expected no trip.

x1_trip_0_ms.description: Trip time at 1×IΔn, 0° phase, expected trip.

x1_trip_180_ms.description: Trip time at 1×IΔn, 180° phase, expected trip.

trip_test_button_ok.description: Whether the physical test button on the RCD operated correctly.

jemena_circuit_asset_id.description: Per-circuit Jemena asset ID (e.g. '30248'). Sub-asset semantics — text marker only, not a FK into assets.

action_taken.description: Free-text: e.g. 'N/A', 'Critical Equipment — do not trip', or description of corrective action on a fail.

is_critical_load.description: When true, the wizard surfaces a guard so the technician doesn't accidentally trip a UPS / ESS feeder.

x-eq-cross-field-rules.message: A board cannot have two circuits with the same number in the same section. Different sections may reuse circuit numbers (e.g. Lighting Section #1 vs Power Section #1).

x-eq-import-hints.description: One row per RCD circuit. Jemena's template uses blank cells for 'no trip' rather than zero — preserve as text. Multi-section boards (Cardiff DB-1) repeat circuit numbers across sections.

common_sources.name: Jemena RCD test tab
watchouts: Empty trip-time cells mean 'did not trip' — preserve as null/empty string, NOT as 0
Section column may be blank for unsectioned boards
Critical-load flag often inferred from 'Action' column text ('Do not trip — critical')
